text: Ordered Caramel frappe at Drive thru, BIG MISTAKE! Took 30 min and there were only 2 cars in front of me.

Drum-roll please! Review #100 coming right up!   I chose to review Starbucks as my 100th review because it is a guilty pleasure. Something that I only allow myself once a week. But something that I crave everyday!   This particular Starbucks is great. The baristas are always friendly and welcoming. The drinks are made correctly and quickly. I usually go with a Salted Caramel Hot Chocolate or Mocha. I also occasionally order the White Mocha. If you can't tell, I enjoy coffee that doesn't taste like coffee! In the summer their iced teas are the perfect thirst quencher! Their breakfast pastry items are always delicious. Try the Cranberry-Orange Scone and you will not be disappointed! Their breakfast sandwiches are unique and pretty tasty as well.  I always choose to go in and place my order over sitting in the drive thru. The line for their drive thru is always ridiculously long. It's usually quicker to go in!

We stopped here for my Chai and Hubby's coffee and caffeine mania. The line went quite fast, they're quick with the service especially not a lot of people at the time. My Chai came out good, awesome! One thing I forgot to do is to purchase more coffee for the house. They have lots for sale. But not too worry because we still have plenty of Starbucks coffee at home. What would life be without Starbucks?

This is a pretty good Starbucks. It is in a great location (state street), so if you feel like taking a stroll with your coffee and popping into some cute local shops, you are in the right place! It is also a nice atmosphere to sit down and do your work. My only complaint is that it is always so busy that when I place an order ahead through the app, there is typically a longer wait than other locations. But overall a great experience!

I went in when they had 4 people working, waited for 15 minutes for my tea latte which came out as basically water. Returned it twice but gave up when the barista offered some other iced tea latte they already had instead. It was still the same - water. The baristas should REALLY REALLY learn how to make their stuff... seriously Starbucks??!!! So disappointed!!!!! :'(

This review is for the drive thru only...  This Starbucks is very fast and the staff is so friendly! I have been several now and the staff remembers me. I just think thats awesome! The Coffee is always right and perfect every time. There are other Starbucks close by, but this one is the best by far. I would suggest this one over the others!

Last Saturday on 12/26/20 I visited this Starbucks through the drive thru. My sister got her beverage and I got my standard hot chocolate. There was a bit of a wait but that is standard for any Starbucks drive thru these days. The beverages were decent and the location on Easton Road (Route 611) is very convenient if not very crowded. Overall, it was a decent experience.

Nothing makes my busy day easy like my iced coffee at Starbucks and this location botched it up for me:( see my photo yup those are coffee grinds at the bottom a whole bunch of coffee grinds:( yuck yuck!

Starbucks...so aren't they all just clones?  a review would be futile if you've already visited one before.  Coffee is ...OK.  It's more like coffee flavored water to me, but does the trick when called upon.  I much prefer some home brewed New Orleans style coffee & chicory.  Chicory makes the coffee... Starbuckathons have no clue what real coffee is like.

I was staying near this location for a month and my experiences were 50/50 right down the middle.. Everytime my order was just one drink.. the service and and drink were perfect. I had received suggestions on how to make my drink better next time I ordered it and recommendations on what might add flavor.. it was great..   But the other half of the time I ordered I always ordered 3 drinks and they were never correct. Ever.. if I said white mocha I got a white hot chocolate.. when I ordered my DoubleShot I received a Mocha.. whats weird is that each time it was a different persons fault.. one time it would be the cash register person writing the wrong order.. and the other time it was the barrista making the drinks.. it was really weird.. I have concluded that it is my fault for these mixups. Presumably my stunning features or my impeccable jaw-line distracting said persons to make mistakes.   I have resigned to never attend this location again. I apologize for flaunting my essence and impeding your abilities. Good day.

Its a good location.I don't like the coffee at the place next door, but combine a Starbucks coffee with a tart from the other place and its a win-win. Well maybe not for my waist line or pocket book.   I like they have large common tables with plenty of outlets under them for computers. I really appreciate the multiple outlet on the walls. Too many people bogart every one of the power plugs, but thats not going to happen here.

Yummy but the staff refused to make a frappacino I have ordered at least three times before at the same location and at least fifty times before in my lifetime at other locations. Also she didn't get half my order then while we waited for it she lectured me about how old my request was . Oh come on. I just want to go to home. I won't be back. But I will say once I got my order to where she would be willing to make it it was very good

If I could give them 0 stars I would. Horrible customer service. I order my coffee as follows, cold brew, no water, 2 shots. This tote always gives me and issue with this order saying that they cannot make it as follows, although the app offers that as an option for online ordering, and every other Starbucks out there has zero complications with this order. Infuriating.

I feel like such a snot complaining about a Starbucks. The staff here is great. My issue here is the guests. There are a couple people that live here. So if you were planning on sitting in one of the cozy chairs think again. They've basically claimed them as their own. Take a close look and you can see their ass prints in each seat. Seriously. And on a nice afternoon there's usually 5-10 too many highschoolers hanging around. They tend to sit outside around the Cold Stone next door which is a little bit of a relief. Where do these kids get money for Starbucks everyday? I was counting change to share a $1 slice at the local pizzeria! But otherwise, drinks made right- every time- also friendly and quick drive-thru.
I don't get the chance to visit this location often, but the time I was there went great. Prompt service, good tasting drinks.

Wallet was stolen today at this starbucks.  The workers there were not helpful at all.  They wanted me to "file a report" to corporate and would call if it showed up.  Meanwhile someone was having fun with my credit card in cherry hill, new jersey.  And they made it seem like it was my fault that it was stolen, but it was stolen when i was sitting with my items. Not helpful or sympathetic.
Love this bucks but the blonde with the red lips has a little bit of an attitude she might need to check....
Fast, efficient service. Tasty coffee. No complaints on my visit.   I wouldn't want to be in the drive thru.... Must have been a line 15 cars long. Hello people! Walk your buns inside!
Great little Starbucks hubs and I came across when we were visiting NOLA! Great neighborhood, clean and great service!

Generally a great Starbucks. There are large amounts of seating inside including both tables and comfier options including leather chairs and sofas. The outside seating is nice, but the ambiance is disrupted by large amount of traffic on Hazel Dell and 116th.  The staff is generally really friendly and the service is quick. This place is crazy on the weekends, with 10+ cars waiting for the drive through, so I would definitely park and stand in the line inside (it's generally a shorter wait).  As Starbucks go, this is a good one.

I visited this location on several occasions this last week and was thoroughly disappointed on every visit. From employees too busy joking with each other to help customers, to waiting for my drink because they made the drinks and food for their regulars first to having an employee offer to help, then walked away from the counter to go do something else, which resulted in my having to bet back into line and wait again. My Vanilla Latte is what you would expect from a Starbucks, consistent and good, but the customer service will keep me from coming back.
My favorite Starbucks! The employees are excellent and learn the regulars. However the parking kind of stinks but that's not their fault.

I come to this Starbucks every so often, and that is for good reason. Not once have I come here and actually been greater by a single person. I get to the ordering menu, the same monotone (I cant be bothered with you) voice answers. I feel like I'm burdening them by being there. I order two things every time, I get to the window, one is ready and the other is forgotten. No a smile or a "hi". The only thing that is said to me is "$5.41". I show them my rewards app, she scans it, hands me my one item, starts taking someone else's order, then closes the window. I don't even go back for that second item out of fear that she'll punch me in the face for wanting anything else. I don't write reviews, but I've been coming here for two years and SOMETHING has to change. It's ridiculous that I go five miles out of my way to avoid this location.

Went to Starbucks again on Easton Road in Warrington pa. today to see what they have on tap.  I've Been going there for years but to no surprise Pike Place only one on tap any thing else  Pour Over Style. I would Bet they have a Ton of Pike place Beans to the Roof in a Warehouse that they have to use. I think for the price of cup of there coffee there should be a Selection of Coffee on Tap to Try .
Horrible customer service. Major attitude problem. Been to many Starbucks in US and in other countries definitely do not follow the Starbucks great customer service model.
Busy location, slow stuff! Clean and always well stocked! Good drinks they cold be a little faster but I still love Starbucks !

Sarah is a great barista! She knees exactly what I meant when I said "that's apple thing. The hot apple juice!" (Caramel apple spice) This location is very clean, the staff is super friendly. My room mate who worked at Starbucks for several years says the same thing!
This Starbucks is in a great location--right by the Southwest Airlines gates.  The service is fast and usually friendly.  They are often well stocked on baked goods and snacks.

Everything is great except the A/C kicks at 10am to where it makes it too cold to hang out. It has been this way for months and I'm not sure why they don't change it. I would rate 5 stars if the A/C functioned properly. Please fix it.

Tried a Flat White for the first time on the recommendation of a friend (Thanks Amy P!) The first location I went to said no, I couldn't because they were out of whole milk. This location though, they were more than happy to oblige. The service was quick and efficient. The barista was both bubbly and sweet as she made my drink order.   The drink itself was tasty, not sweet but rich on the tongue. Next time I get this, I'll see if they can add vanilla to it.
This Starbucks always makes drinks correctly and the drive thru is fast... Even on busy mornings.

Strawberry smoothie, you are too good to me. If you're still okay with drinking cold drinks before work when it's 20 degrees outside, head to Starbucks.   The staff is friendly, the drinks are delicious (although they are overpriced) and all of the Christmas goodies inside are awesome.   Great place to relax or prep for a work day.   See you again soon Southport Starbucks!
They charge $2 more for tomato mozzarella sandwich then the regular stand-alone Starbucks do.
This Starbucks is struggling.  Understaffed and undertrained.  Avoid until they get it together

I love Starbucks but not this location. The customer service was not up to par.  My friend and I came in to have a Passion Fruit Ice Tea and enjoy our time together. The barista was not helping to invoke the essence of Starbucks. He was rude while taking our orders and did not have a smile on his face whatsoever.  He seemed like he did not care to be there and just rolled his eyes whenever we had a question...not cool at all!  Once again, I love Starbucks they just need help being more friendly towards people.

I know, this is just another old Starbucks however, the staff here is amazing! Super nice folks and very friendly. Not sure if the holiday season was affecting them but they were great! Olivia was making samples and asked which drink sounded best to try. I opted for the peppermint mocha. Long story short, the staff here is awesome. You will enjoy talking with them.
Great coffee and in a good location.  Come here regularly and the staff are always nice
Love love love coming in here on my most tired mornings to treat myself to the wonderful deliciousness of Starbucks. The staff always gets the order right each time I come in here.

This is one of my favorite Starbucks locations - it's large, has ample indoor & outdoor seating, generally good customer service and delicious coffee.   I like that they always have nice displays of their coffee cups and other merchandise you can buy - I have purchased a few gifts for fellow coffee lovers here! Good place to study - with headphones on - and always love the free wifi!

It's a Starbucks.  There isn't a whole lot of difference between them.    The coffees, especially the bold ones, are always good, hot, and somewhat overpriced.  The baristas are always very friendly but unhurried, and they no longer try to correct me when I ask for a large coffee.

Having lived close by this location in my college years, I have a fondness to this Starbucks because of the memories, and will still stop by if I'm in the area. They have a decent drive-thru, and they make my latte right.   Apparently Starbucks has updated their oatmeal to stone rolled oats that aren't quite as good and the baristas are still working out the water ratio. My oatmeal was extremely watery on my last visit, and I tried to bring it back but the barista told me he put in the right amount, but I had to wait 5 minutes... OK, it had been at least 4 minutes, but to give him the benefit of the doubt  I waited another 5 minutes... still extremely watery.  I get that it's new, but I wish he would have just gotten me a new one instead of making me wait another 5 minutes. Oh well, my coffee was still good and I'll be back if I'm close by!
I'm never disappointed with my food here! love the Carmel macchiato, it's my go to drink!
First time here he is so kind and explain really good and i love table and i also buy tea cuz I couldn't find it near my area so anyway happy to be here
Ewe!! Went for a night coffee. Paid $15 and did not get what I ordered. It was horrible. Won't be stopping at this one again!

All starbucks coffee and food is pretty much the same at every location, so this review is solely about the service which is TOP NOTCH.   I have been going to this Starbucks on average 3 times a week before work in the morning for the past 2 or 3 months. I always have the same baristas who are super friendly and genuienly nice. The service is incredibly fast too.   The only reason I am not giving them 5 stars is because they haven't learned my order or name yet. Every morning they still ask for my order along with my name to write on the cup. They recognize other customers, why not me?... I desperately yearn to be a "regular."
Always good service! Need plant-based food options (all locations). I have noticed much better snacks.
I always get some iced coffee that is very complicated, and they always get my drink right! They're fast and kind. Megan is my favorite barista, always taking care of me!
Just had an employee rather rudely get in my face about "being there without having purchased anything" when one of her coworkers had made my order about 30 minutes prior.

Meh, typical Starbucks with expensive coffee and great pastries.   I think the organization and distribution of drinks could be better. A bunch of us ended up standing at the end of the counter waiting for drinks that were just being placed in front of us with no names on cups or any idea of what was in said cups.   Overall, though, service was friendly. Interior is clean.

Yes. I am at it again. A day does not go by that I don't have my coffee from Starbucks. I come here so much be it through drive through or going in at the batista  knows exactly what I want and how I want it.  I couldn't ask for a better way to start my morning.   Although they are extremely busy in the morning the drive thru moves very fast and my coffee is always piping hot. To top it off the customer service is always good.  Thank you for the invention of coffee. Thank you for the invention of Starbucks!

SUPER super friendly baristas :) The best peppermint mocha's in town and the drive thru is very fast, even in the busiest part of the morning! Definitely drive a bit out of my way to go to this particular store when I need a S'bucks!

Okay, I am not one to flame a restaurant, first of all. But.. this is ridiculous. This is an establishment that serves food and drinks, and I have NEVER seen SO MANY FLIES and other bugs in a building since I once went horseback riding in 6th grade. Am I exaggerating? No. I am sitting here, right now, in fact, twitching every minutes when a fly lands on me. And it's not the same fly. After swatting four on my own, I gave up. FOUR. There is also a giant wasp-like insect about 5 feet from me.  Also, there was no toilet paper in the bathroom and I had to ask twice before they brought some. Again, if this was a stable, a meadow, or even a bookstore or a seedy bar, the bugs and lack of TP wouldn't bother me. But people are eating food and drinking drinks that have been exposed to some serious insects. And if these are just the bugs I see, I don't want to think about the bugs everywhere else. Seriously this is foul. Two flies attached to each other (mating? fighting?) just landed on my table. Whoa.  Also, I have had to pretty much assault my friend Brittany while trying to get some of the bugs off of her. Now I look like an asshole.  You might be asking, "But Anna, why don't you just leave?" Because traffic is about to get really bad, that's why.  Get it together Starbucks

The girl in the drive thru had an attitude with me when I asked about the puppy cup. She wasn't friendly at all. When I got the puppy cup it had one dollop of whip cream.... so then I ask if I could have some more and she barely gives me anything and says sure..like that's not cool. If it's such a problem and hassle I'll pay, that's not the issue. I go to this Starbucks all the time. I don't know what her issue is but she needs to fix it

Staff is friendly, bathrooms are clean. They put out FF milk, half and half and Whole Mike... For your beverages on the coffee bar. I'm finding most Starbucks don't do that any longer. A few groups meet here everyday. Its always a great place to start your day :)

This Starbucks is top notch. Some of the best baristas I've seen work. Not much seating inside but lots outside. This is a very popular place after school hours. Peak runs through 8am-11am and 3:30pm-5pm so if you want to have really quick service, go there between those times. Many regulars come to this Starbucks and you can see why, welcoming baristas, fast service, and always willing to remake something for you.

I'm convinced that the people that work here just make whatever they think you should drink rather than what you actually order. I especially love when one certain condescending employee informs me that "skim milk beverages do not come with whip" after requesting no whip. Oh but it does...every.single.time. The other day, I ordered 3 items and every single item was either made incorrectly or completely the wrong thing.  Also, the drive thru....so slow. Glacial, even.
Really great coffee. My favorite is the classic grande iced coffee with almond milk and two sugars! Also really love the cake pops and little snack boxes.

They were nice and gave my sweet, little, 18lb baby a "puppachino"   He looked like scaly wag when he got it all over his little pug face.   They were very polite, however dogs are not allowed. We had to eat it in the parking lot. While walking my sweet little pug friend, I couldn't help but notice the amount of cancer sticks thrown behind Starbucks landscaping. Shame on you Starbucks employees!!! Keep Southport beautiful!

Ordered coffee on the mobile app as I was walking from the tattoo place on church street. The place was packed with people when I got there but no one was in line and right as I walked in the barista places my order on the counter. 5 stars for the speedy drink making. I can't rate the customer service since I didn't actually interact with anyone but I'm satisfied with not having to wait for my coffee.
Very disappointed. Order was incorrect & no one seemed interested in helping to correct the problem by refunding the overcharge.  Will avoid this location in the future.

I'm a pretty laid back guy, but I am big on manners and etiquette. When I asked the manager "How's your day going?", his response was, "What can I get you?"  The young man also proceeded to call me "dude" multiple times, although this is a word I often use, it is definitely not appropriate for a customer you do not know. I still went back the next day to get some more work done, but found it impossible due to the overly loud, obnoxious conversation of the employees. I'm all for a fun work environment, but please respect your patrons. Nice enough people, they just need a course on social etiquette and treating customers with respect.

Another starbucks review but seriously, this place is awesome! I am an addict of the Doppio Espresso, and for some reason this place makes it that much stronger and appropriate. Especially over ice, they simply know the way I like it which is not filled to the brim with ICE.  Their services are impeccable, and speedy. Their layout is better than most starbucks in the sense that there is actual parking, and you don't have to fight through hordes of people waiting for coffee to get to a seat. A great relaxing place for a good cup of joe.

What!? A Starbucks across from CC's?  And they are open till 9pm when CC's closes at 5? Interesting choice to make! The interior is beautiful and it seems there is an entrance from outside and also the lobby of the main building.  Great views of Poydras from the window and it looks like there is lots of seating.
When asked if they are a stand alone store, the gal had no idea.  How stupid can you get.

Good Starbucks location and easy to get in and out of. This location has a larger front patio with plenty of outdoor seating  if you so choose.  The inside is also a good size. Friendly staff and I was in and out. Almost tempted to grab a glass of wine instead but stayed the course and went for s jolt.

My go to Starbucks!!! Staff are friendly and know my cinnamon dolce latte obsession. Lol. I was annoyed when this place was closed for construction because there aren't any really near me other than this one besides the BHP one... and there's just too much traffic. Drive thru here can be slow but it's not usually a big deal since I stop after work. Can't wait for pumpkin spice to come back because I'm basic. Not sorry.
This location drive thru is so slow, I've been waiting in line for ten minutes before is started writing this review. There are still two cars ahead of me...

My go to spot for my caffeine fix. Great location because it's typically on my way to most places. Only bad thing is very little parking but I always do drive-thru. The drive-thru line moves along fairly quick so no big deal.

This Starbucks location is usually crowded and the crowds usually mean you're in for a long wait, unfortunately. The drinks come out a little bit more slowly here, and it's tough to get a table. The layout works well, but the place is small, so there's not a lot of seating.  What I can say, though, is that I am usually waited on with a smile and a nice "how are you today" which makes the waiting suck a little less. Nice staff, long waits adds up to an A-OK in my book.

Obviously it's starbucks and obviously their products are the same everywhere so I won't say anything about what they have, rather, how they have it.  I've been here about a million times, it's close to school and my department frequents this location.  I give three stars because it seems that there is almost Always a line.  On occasion I have waited longer than felt necessary for a drink, and I have been there at least three times when they were out of vanilla syrup.  How the heck does starbucks run out of vanilla syrup??  Anyways,  they have a great outdoor seating section, one of the best in my opinion, and the workers are normally very nice.

5 people taking orders no one making coffee.  Waited 10 min and my coffee cup with my name on it still sat!  I don't have time to wait 10 min for a 5$ coffee!!!   Worst Starbucks ever!!!  Seemed cooperate was sitting around watching this all happen. Never again.
Jerk behind the counter gave me a cup with a mangled lip that he knew would leak. Which it did. Free coffee replacement won't pay for a $50 shirt with coffee stains.

Worst service I've ever received from a starbucks. They had four employees "working" while most of them were standing around while there's was eight people waiting for there drinks. The manager on duty or supervisor didn't seem to have any sense of urgency on getting the drinks made  and neither did the employees. Terrible experience and even worse service

I think they must have several new people. A young girl dumped a coffee down the side of my white car with barely an apology.  And what the heck is going on with the drive through wait time?? I was trapped in the drive through for at least 30 minutes. Unbelievable.

OMG coffee machines are broken at Starbucks and on Mardi Gras cold weekend!!! Unbelievable at least they could have put a sign at the front door stating so!!! We were told at the register after we waited almost 25 minutes to order and no coffee!! Gave them a 2 cause no signs posted that machine news were down and coffee is not good at all. They are making drip coffee and putting a filter over your cup and pouring hot water, not a great coffee as it tasted like cigarette, weird flavor.

Setting aside my expectations of a barista greeting me & being able to take my order pretty quickly, I'm hopefully optimistic.  So, the shift manager was on the phone when I walked in - didn't acknowledge me. One other barista is working drive thru - not tons of cars in line (1or2), but engaged. Looks like another barista may be coming on.  Okay, so I'll just order on the app & see what happens?  Two other customers came in & ordered after me. Manager finished the call & took an order - boom delivered. Next order delivered.  Don't see my order at pick up, guess I'll get off here and go check in. Not the best SBucks in town. Oh wait, my name was just called - received my drink, but I'm thinking I may have to ask for my bakery item, hmm, yeah the barista is helping a new customer now.  The kid that just came on and is taking over the DThru seems pretty sharp. Shift manager is tag-teaming the order for the new customer, I think? Another customer has come in - maybe four min ago - not acknowledged until the barista was ready to take the order.  Man, I want my bakery item ... lots of gnats where I'm standing btw. Latest customer (a new one) doesn't look to pleased?  Oh, just got asked if I was waiting on another mobile order - gonna get my bakery item, yes!  Got it, oh & the barista apologized for the wait (that's what I'm taking about, a little acknowledgment goes a long way). Ah, Just realize the shift manager was making a big ole fancy drink just before announcing "see you after my 10 min break".  I'll give another star - I don't like complaining. Just wish I could have been greeted with a "hi or hello or good afternoon" maybe a "we'll be right with you." Just a side note - no napkins, tables are dirty. I'm thinking this could be a fantastic SBucks w/a little better management & a lot of hard work. Realize this is more a play by play/commentary, not done many reviews. Thanks for letting me vent. I'll be back. I'm a sucker. Plus, maybe I could be an encouragement, maybe help somehow & right?
On my way to a bowling tournament. This looked like a nice one to stop at.   Drive through on a Sunday morning is pretty quick. Staff is very friendly here.

This is the worst Starbucks location I have ever been at! It's the closest Starbucks to my house so normally I do go there. However, 90% of the time, my orders are wrong, ( all i EVER order is black coffee with heavy cream on a side, how can you mess it up? ) have a bunch of employees working, but even with only few people in line I managed to wait at least 10 minutes.....Last time I went I waited at least 5 minutes, being the only customer, 5 employees were present  and no one even acknowledge that I was there by at least saying        " Will be with you soon as we can". Nada!

My husband and I are frequent customers of this Starbucks location because we live nearby to it. We typically drink Starbucks anywhere we go due to the fact that they offer the specialty coffee drinks and we run into little to no problems when ordering. Unfortunately at this location, more often than not, we have to send the drink back because it's missing something we asked for. This is alarming because what if someone who was ordering a specialty drink made a certain way due to health issues such as diabetes and their request for sugar free sweetener was ignored? I've never ran into this issue so much at any other location that we have ordered from and hopefully the next time a barista repeats the order back, they actually make it the way they are saying it.

Long drive-thru time but I am not going to blame the workers.  I am going to blame the company for selling food that requires heating.  The person who took my order was super pleasant and my coffee was hot and exactly as ordered.  I've never had a bad beverage from this location....just don't go if you're in a hurry.

On Fat Tuesday you have a staff of 5. Are you serious?  You are on one of the most popular corner Poydras and St. Charles day of Mardi Gras and you don't properly staff your location. Come on Starbucks. They have one person on the register and on guy who looks like he is trying to look busy so he doesn't have to do work. This is ridiculous.   The staff is moving slow as turtles no smiles no hi how are you. Heads down they have one door open and the line is out if the door. The only good thing was I got bathroom tickets. DO BETTER

This place is down the street from my house, so I got there often since my bus stop is also around the corner.  Usually very busy, so there is a bit of a wait.  I've never had an issue with staff. I actually like a few of them.  I think the location is a bit inconvenient, because it's hard to get in and out of the parking lot, if you drive.  There's also two parking spots on the side that are a bit dangerous since you have to back out into a busy street corner where traffic can turn, so I would never drive there.
The dirtiest Starbucks I've ever been in. They do seem super busy so hoping that they were just understaffed today.

Wonderful staff here really make the visit every time. The coffee and goodies are consistently good, and the design and layout of this particular franchise are very nice.   But for me, their staff make this a 5 star experience. Friendly, knowledgeable and willing to go out of their way to make sure the customer has a great experience.

The streets of Santa Barbara are almost empty, but this Starbucks is open for take away service.  So glad that they can work during these scary times. Super Friendly and nice!!! Just make me feel good. Thank you for that amazing service, great staff
Went to this Starbucks today, first visit. Everything ok.  One of their smaller facilities, but enough space where you could sit and do work on a laptop.

I absolutely love this Starbucks - servers are friendly, coffee is always well crafted and if you go during down times they're pretty quick. My only gripe with this starbucks is obviously the parking lot is ridiculously small - forget going there in the morning when it's work time. You will never get a parking spot and the drive thru will take forever. The longest I've ever waited in the drive thru is 20 minutes and the only reason I stayed is because I couldn't get out of the line due to the high curb.   Now if you can go after the morning craziness the service is superb. Also the pastries and breakfast sandwiches are fresh. I've had the croissants, very berry coffee cake, banana bread, brownies, bacon & gouda breakfast sandwich (this was just okay), veggie & monterey jack breakfast sandwich, turkey bacon and white cheddar breakfast sandwich and never left there disappointed.

I got my coffee right away like after I placed my order in. The barista was making my drink as I was paying. The store was kind of packed but luckily I found a seat by the door. I got my usual drink, venti Carmel frapp and it was delicious as usual.   I gave it 4 stars because the workers were talking among themselves and goofing around too much. They should be talking to their customers not amongst each other's regarding something that happened earlier in the day.  It's a pretty small Starbucks so just FYI try to get there early to avoid the lengthy lines. It is right across the Betsy Ross House.
Have waited 25 minutes for my order on numerous occasions. Store is busy, but less so than other locations. Staff is unfriendly and unapologetic.

I love starbucks! Do not get me wrong. But during this time of Social Distancing and not being able to go in to the store to pick up my coffee and food before I head into work sucks. I can not wait in that long line that is piled up to almost the Wine Warehouse for almost an hour. I ordered online and pulled in front of the starbucks. I called them asking if they could bring out my coffee due to not being able to wait in the line the lady told me no and then hung up. 2 weeks ago. I did the same thing on a Saturday Morning asking if they could bring it out to me and the lady was VERY KIND and told me they were starting it that on that coming up Monday. I'm extremely upset. I now have wasted 10 dollars. I want a refund.

Best Starbucks in St. Louis. Great crew and the drive thru is super fast! Arnold is an official city now because we have a Starbucks! I have never had an issue at this Starbucks.   The place is always clean and stocked very well.
I've tried to give this location a chance but every time I come here the baristas are so rude. I come here because it's closest to my school but I will find another location.

Dear  Starbucks Co.  I drink your coffee when I'm in a pinch due to your baristas' lack of coffee knowledge and poor attitude. The lack of customer service has only increased with current Covid-19 regulations.   You know... I'm so ticked off, I'm not even going to bother further.

Awesome. I locked myself out of the house and car this morning (with the car running), and promptly locked myself out. There was no spare key in sight, and of course I forgot my wallet inside.  I went down to my local coffee shop (Gracious Goods Cafe) who would NOT spot me a small coffee (although they allowed me to sit and warm up), despite having $1.56 of the $2.35 cost.  After tracking down my roomie, I took the train downtown where she gave me the key and a couple bucks to get a coffee, which I was now desparate for. After asking how my day was and telling the barista about my crazy day so far, they gave me a latte on the house. Made what was already a frustrating day a little sunnier.   Thanks Dolls!

Ordered 2 coffees and a muffin. Got one coffee and the muffin 20 minutes before the second coffee. Watched people who came in after me get drinks while I continued to wait for the second coffee.  How do you give half an order to someone and then make them wait for the rest while the first one gets cold?  This is not the first time this has happened.
Always a pleasure to stop in while waiting for the bus or simply walking around downtown on a day off.

I always seriously enjoy Starbucks, but this Starbucks has been a complete let down all 6 times I've visited! The staff is incredibly rude and they consistently make drinks improperly, then make it seem like you're being a "problem" for having hem remake it.  I have called corporate on this Starbucks after my 3rd disappointment, and just chose to try it again a few more times, and each time... disappointed. Get it together south Tampa!
Great location! They are always open on time (6am) and the staff is super friendly. Never had a mistake on my order. Top notch!
Being from Seattle/Tacoma comes with certain expectations of a Starbucks team. Very under-trained staff. Very Slow. Unusual for every other Starbucks.

The Starbucks locations in Tampa Bay are below average. Usually they are mobbed and have below average staff in terms of drink-making skills. This location is no exception. If you want a large Starbucks to hang out in, check out the one on MLK Jr. Blvd. in Tampa. It's never mobbed and staff are nice.

Alright so Starbucks is usually Starbucks in my book. Went in here after lunch, got through the line quick with friendly service. Coffee was hot, and they have coconut milk here. Things seemed business as usual and what you would expect walking into a Starbucks.   Remember: if you have the Starbucks app, open it while your in line to make sure your signed in and not when you get to the register (like I did #fail).
Claimed a star reward by ordering a java chip frappuccino at the drive thru here. I was very disappointed with the watered down taste - mostly ice and only a few chips.
If your in a hurry, this is not the place to come. Took 12 minutes from taking my order to getting my coffee.
I have been to many Starbucks locations across the country and this is easily My favorite. Very friendly staff, comfortable seating,nice environment

Unusually dirty for a Starbucks. From the sidewalk, front door, exterior trash.  Also the interior of the restaurant and restrooms need cleaned. This location needs a deep clean inside and out. Open food container in the self serve cooler, just not  what you'd expect in such a nice area and of Starbucks.

Their mocha drinks are my favorite thing in the world. I drink them every few days to go with my schoolwork. It keeps me going and tastes delicious. The baristas are really cool. I will go here as long as they stay open.

I came with a work colleague just to take a walk for some fresh air really.  I ended up getting a small Berry Hibiscus Refresher (low-cal, no caffeine, minimal sugar), and I really enjoyed it.  It was a good pick me up in the mid-afternoon.  And I didn't think it was majorly expensive like many items they have.  Baristas were friendly, and service was quick.
The staff is always very friendly, the store is always clean and a great place to meet friends for coffee!

Staff isn't very friendly inside they look very annoyed every time I've been inside, not very inviting to sit and relax and drink or eat, usually the drive through seems better to use at this location
I LOVE STARBUCKS!!! I think that's all I have to say about it..  The location, however, is very convenient and the service is great, friendly and fast.  Definitely recommend.
Great Cali-cat experience with Steven! Thanks for makin our Starbucks experience fun!

The employees in this Starbucks are some of the best and sweetest baristas I've encountered in a while. Their products are consistent, and if not they are always there for easy fixes. This store is always clean and the wait is never too long!!!

First by letting me say I am a Starbucks addict! I eat drink or work at some Starbucks location almost every single day. This time I didn't go in but just grab myself some coffee in the drive-through. This Starbucks drive-through is not necessarily ideal. You have to basically go through the line of fire from the drive-through line to get to the front door if you decided you wanted to go inside instead of using the drive-through. This location is also connected to body pages, which..., If you have some dry cleaning and want to grab a coffee is absolutely ideal! However the layout for the drive-through and parking for the guests that are going into the location is a bit dangerous and a bit muddled up. You have people there parking across the street that are trying to get into the entrance you have people from the drive-through trying to get out of the drive-through and into the drive through and all of them have to cross in the same general area. Unfortunately this is the only drive-through Starbucks within quite some ways... And if it's snowing or raining and you're in a hurry this is going to be your best bet. The people here are always absolutely amazing, like all Starbucks! So I give them three stars for the drive-through but five stars for the staff.

On more than one occasion I have gone to this Starbucks (super close to my house).  Unfortunately, there is always an employee there who feels the need to berate the customers.  I have made orders there that I make at other store locations and I am told that they are not allowed to order that way and treated like I am inconveniencing them.  They usually have a friendly person taking orders, but perhaps bad management, they seem to have quite a bit of turn over.  I was also told by the person in charge that the other stores made my order as requested because "They are not doing their jobs right."  Seriously...?

I felt like this was a Starbucks claim at a trailer park! Very entertaining staff! If you want a show I'd recommend going in and watching the tattooed toothless baristas trying to figure out how to brew coffee. Don't order from here they don't know anything!

Unfortunately we were disappointed  in our experience at this  Starbucks location.  Ordered a latte with almond milk and when asking the Barista if it was the answer was "it should be" in a rude tone......it wasn't it was milk and was subsequently thrown out out.

Very busy mall location.  Service people are great, and they do manage to get the customers in and out as quickly as possible.  I've stood in line outside in the hall several times.  Good thing I'm a coffee junkie :-)

Located inside Willow Grove Mall, this Starbucks is like any other free standing store except it doesn't open at 6am. It still opens a little earlier than the other stores here so if you are one of those "walkers" in the mañana then you have a place to get a caffeine fix to keep your energy up. There are plenty of pastries, cups, mugs, bags of coffee, and other Starbucks themed knick-knacks to purchase in addition to the standard beverages. There is plenty of seating and there are two single occupancy bathrooms in this store, so you don't need to use the general mall bathrooms to pee from the diuretic you just drank and paid $5 for, nice.  Anyway, staff is always friendly, drinks are generally made to Sarbucks standards, and the place is always clean. Check it out if you are at the mall.

First let me say I'm giving this 5 stars just compared to other Starbucks not compared to other coffee shops on general. This was one of the best Starbucks I've been too. The customer service was fantastic and though I didn't stay to sit down it seemed to have more seats than the usual store. I am used to getting a slightly different spelling or different name but here I got the worst Starbucks name fail I ever experienced. My name is Kristin and when I got to the car I realized she wrote "Griffin" on both my cups! Oh well the drinks were perfect and my mom and I had a good laugh!

How hard is it to pour liquid into a cup to the proper height of the cup. I took the lid off and the coffee instantly starting pouring out. Not little drops, but POURING out obviously overfilled and spilling in my truck, on my clothes. You don't want to leave room for cream and sugar, that's fine, DONT FILL IT TO THE RIM THINKING Nothing can happen. Last I check there's still gravity and pressure on earth so movement and grasping the cup will change the dynamics of the damn contents inside the cup people!

Convenient location right next to my favorite nail shop. I come every time I get my nails done, which is often!   It gets super busy here so be prepared to wait in line. The baristas are super friendly and try to get you your drink in a timely manner.   If your drink doesn't come out the way you want, they're really good about remaking it! Which is always a plus!

This is the best Starbucks in the city. I don't know what it is about this location (perhaps the fact that they only have a cafe and no drive thru) but the service here is always top notch. No waiting for 20 minutes for a luke warm latte - these people get shit done! I love coming here because I know they will always get my order correct. As  a former Starbucks barista, I know the demands of the job and these people are doing it riiight! Props to their manager.

This Starbucks is very clean, in a small and nice location, their service is great, the people here always serve with a smile. I came here to get coffee with my girlfriend and they make the coffee perfect every time that I have been here, I'll have to go back and put them to the test again, I know Starbucks isn't for a lot of people because they are a little bit higher than other coffee places, but I think the customer service makes up for a lot of the negativity that is given to Starbucks, give them a try and if their not for you more power to you enjoy!

Employees are always friendly. Lines can tend to be long at times but it's worth the wait. I'm a creature of habit and typically order a caramel macchiato most days. Absolutely love their scones as well!

I'm here a few times a week. I would like to give it a higher star rating, but due to the service issues, I am giving it a two.   The drinks here are always on point.   The lines are long and they rarely are running both registers.   On a regular basis there is something missing at the Customer Prep Bar: missing cream, sugar, stir sticks, stoppers.

This Starbucks is SO slow. I sit in the drive through for a solid 15-20 minutes every time. The only reason I keep coming back is because there isn't a closer location to me. If you go on your way to work? Give yourself plenty of extra time. I understand it's busy in the morning and I'll have to wait a little bit, but not that long. It's only a drive through location so there is no excuse for them to take so long. They never seem to be in a hurry or rush to speed things up.

Why do I have to keep leaving updates? I spoke with the district manager. She was super nice and promised to mail me a gift card to compensate for the horror I experienced. That was in january. It's almost march.
Best Starbucks in NOLA I have been a regular there for years now. Everyone is so nice at it.

Before getting on the Pa Turnpike early this morning, I made a short detour onto Horizon Boulevard to get some java and a small bite for breakfast.  When Chik-Fil-A was not yet open, I drove through the take out window at Starbucks next door.    I liked the convenience and time savings of a drive thru, but it seemed like the order taker was also the barista as well as the short order cook.  So, she looked rather busy, and in need of assistance.  Still, she kept her composure and got everything right.    As usual, the coffee had a burnt and bitter taste, but the extra milk requested helped to soften the harshness.  I asked for their Sausage, Egg and Cheese Sandwich on a croissant, but was told that all these meals are pre-packaged and microwaved just before sale.  I decided to go with the English Muffin as the only option.  I don't like what microwaves do to eggs and bread, so the meal was at best, average.  Nothing I would want a second time.    Hopefully, CFA will be open next time I find myself in a similar predicament.

This is the closest one to my house and although I wish they'd build one in the gentilly/NOLA East area, this is the best one to go to. It's in a very nice neighborhood and the environment is always chill and relaxing for study parties or getting a coffee on the go!

Hey Starbucks - when it's slow - customer service is even more important. The woman on drive thru duty (identified by the headset) waited on me when I walked in. The silence between us was awkward for me because I never know if they are listening to someone outside. I waited for her que. I ordered my cocoa. She made it personally. Two of her coworkers were busy behind the counter. No one said thank you. I loved the way my order was announced - just like when they are busy. I'm a grande hot chocolate. There were no other customers anywhere - inside or outside. Went home across the street. One full inch of room I noted upon arrival - within 3 minutes. Thought it would have whip? Called to ask if it comes standard? Yes indeed the reply. Well, not in mine. Woman with attitude at this store. And no team to help her out. Baby it's cold inside. I am more sure than ever I must cut the cord to you Starbucks. Good-bye.

Starbucks isn't usually at the top of my coffee shop list, but this location is pretty nice. It's easy to find and has a lot of parking, so it makes a good meeting point.  The staff are always very friendly, and it's usually busy, but I've never seen it busy enough that there are no free seats.

I hate to say this Starbucks is becoming the worst. Every time I go they are out of pastries and sandwiches... Also, they tend to miss my request for alternate milk or an espresso shot. I've been a few times when they closed the drive thru. This location has limited parking so it was mass confusion when this happened. This is really unfortunate since this is the closest Starbucks in the area.

The lady forgot to write Vanilla on my latte. I left the store and when i got into my car and started driving i realized it was wrong, so i stopped at the starbucks on 4th and south and they made me a new one!

Eew. l just paid $17 for: a triple Macchiato that tastes like nothing but milk (no espresso in sight despite paying for extra espresso), a mocha Frappuccino that is basically ice and chocolate syrup (you can even see the ice visibly separated from the syrup) not in the least appetizing, and a mocha that tastes like chocolate water. First and last visit.

I go to this Starbucks all of the time because the baristas are decently quick at making orders (I order from the app) and they are always friendly. This particular time I ordered a Mocha Cookie Crumble Frap and it was done within two minutes of me ordering the drink on the app from outside the building. As always, the beverage was made well and I left feeling satisfied.

I went into this Starbucks on a Sunday last week and heard Rap Music which isn't good music to listen to when I was coming in to enjoy coffee and work on my laptop. Shift manager was some female with the name tag Nic not a very good representative of the Starbucks atmosphere you want. Will let all my friends know to stay away from this Starbucks. Hope they change the shift managers if they want to keep customers coming back.

Don't hate it but don't love it. I've yet to find a Starbucks where they are actually moderate to quick service wise--- and I just mean to take my order- obviously it takes time to make coffee.  I went to this location on a Saturday to try the new Smores frap. There was one guy ahead of me. He was ordering a bag of coffee.... it took the lady a really long time to get him this coffee. meanwhile 3 other employees walked around behind the counter... looking at me but not asking me if I needed help... I continue to wonder why this part of the Starbucks chain fails at EVERY location..

I love this place!!! In the month that I got to spend in Tucson visiting I wend through the drive through at least once a day and never had any serious issues.  There was one time that my order was confused by someone working in the drive through but the staff quickly fixed it prior to it becoming an issue and gave me a free drink because of it.    My kids also loved this place, all I have to say is they do something with chocolate milk that is awesome.

Love this Starbucks. It's the closest to my home and it's a quick stop on my way to work. Bob, the guy on AM drive-thru, always has a kind word for me, and made the effort to know me by name. The drinks are almost always good, though I have had mistakes before. The staff here isn't as diligent after the busy morning hours, but no major complaints. A good tip for any Starbucks patron visiting even once a week is to sign up for their Rewards program. By paying with a pre-paid gift card that is registered on their site, members are treated to special offers, periodic freebies and more. It's really worth it if you frequent often.

It was about 20 min to closing and I stopped by to grab a coffee  and cookie  as I asked for the cookie the guy on shift told me that they where all out so I asked what else they had. He said all the food was sold for the day and there wasn't anymore left. Unfortunately I looked over and saw plenty of stuff. Horrible service

I have to start by saying I'm an avid Starbucks customer and have been going to this location for a couple months now. Every time I go there, I always get amazing customer service!   I usually order a grande iced "dirty" chai-tea latte, which is just a normal iced chai-tea but with a shot of espresso. Today, I went there and ordered my usually & the barista, Kat, gave me some hints on ordering it really yummy!  She was so nice and informative!  Nothing close a girl & her coffee !

Quality of my mobile order coffee was fine. Also ordered breakfast but was not correct. Looked at me like I was insane when I politely asked for my toppings and a spoon for my oatmeal (the only place to get them was behind the employee counter). Really loud and giggly baristas that were blasting lady gaga and other top 40 club music (which I don't think is normal for starbucks?) not what you want at 7am when you haven't had your coffee yet. I mean, do you and be happy but please...shhhhhh
Can't stand their coffee.  It tastes like it was strained through an old sock.  I'll stick to Tim Hortons.

Today I brought my mother to this particular location for the 1/2 off  Frappuccino  They posted signs saying that they have a broken blender and are short staffed.  So regardless of our wait that might be to come, we went in anyways.  Speed of service was GREAT!  They got the Frappuccinos (4 of them) within a few minutes..  Not realizing they cut all the Corners they could to get our order out.  My mother and grandmother ordered light Carmel  Frappuccinos  And my father and I ordered the new Carmel waffle cone Frappuccinos  When We enter the building weren't greeted or welcomed in and there wasn't a smile on anyone's face, they seemed stressed due to being short staffed.  My mother found chucks of ice in her drink which was suppose to be blended And her Frappuccino and my grandmas both had waffle crumbles on top when that wasn't even what they ordered.   Also to top it all off The store was dirty, and no one had a smile or a good attitude. When I brought it to someone's attention that my frappuccino was wrong (I ordered it with no coffee)  He snatched the cup from me threw it away and proceeded to make me the new one..  My dad ordered that same Frappuccino  And could have taken the mess up home instead of throwing it in the trash...   Over all may main question is,  As a store manager or a store owner...  WHY weren't you there?  WHY wasn't someone there to fix or replace the blender and help with the under staffed shift?   Hmmm... Maybe we have a management problem with this store.  Over all not a good Visit.

This is a great Starbucks. The staff is always friendly and like many other Starbucks they are rather efficient at what they do. I do find some inconsistency between baristas and this location is so busy in the mornings that I've gotten to the parking lot and there were no spaces available. I've had to park in the strip mall next door and walk several times. The drive thru line is also often backed up into the strip mall driveway in the mornings. I visit this location 1-2 times a week and will continue to do so.
It's  clean and organized this early in the morning. Wifi is strong, limited electrical plug outlets availability and restrooms require a code to enter them.

They weren't the fastest but weren't the slowest either! . the one on terry parkway is really slow... much slower than this one.  My boyfriend says they weren't that slow and I am impatient in the mornings without caffeine lol. He's probably right.

Pretty fast service (even during a very busy day) and decently clean.  Unfortunately due to Starbucks regulations, when I asked to try one of the teas, they couldn't give me a sample but hey I guess with a chain we can't be too picky. They could have been a little bit more informed on the coffee and tea choices. When my boyfriend asked one of the baristas which of their coffees has the most bold flavor, she answered "sorry I don't know that answer, I don't drink coffee" hmmm what?! How are you a barista with no opinion in coffee because you don't drink it. Ouch that was not a good thing. My boyfriend eventually got a coffee that was not nearly as strong as hoped.

Unfortunate. Slow drive thru and customer service seems to be less than desired. Exterior of building need some cleanup and a few light bulbs replaced. This is probably a lack of effort on management and should be brought to their attention. If you have the opportunity to choose a Starbucks you may want to skip this location or delete 20 minutes from your life.

I frequently visit this Starbucks when I am down town, which in the past 8 months has been a lot! This Starbucks is very central as well as it is very close to my boyfriends (and soon to be my) place! I love Starbucks with all of my heart, you could say I'm a bit of a coffee snob! I like that there is parking near by, although I usually just walk over. I've always been pleased with the service as well as the beverages here!

This Starbucks is very rude, always seem to have smart remarks. Aren't very updated on new drinks and almost try to make you feel stupid for saying something wrong. This Starbucks location is a bad review in itself.

Uugh, how disappointing for the Starbucks chain. This is getting very irritating. I mean, I know its Albertson's but come on, you don't have pain bagel's & cream cheese? They have almost every other heart attack breakfast thing there menu but no plain bagel's. KILLIN' ME SMALLS! Also, why is the light roast coffee taste like 20/50 motor oil? Strike 2 for Starbucks in Goleta. Very disappointing.

Ok, so this may be a real shocker... but just in case you weren't officially aware; my name is Christy and I love SBUX.    Now that the formalities are out of the way...I'm sure we can agree that all locations are not created equal. Especially this new Ferguson jewel. Totally in a class of it's own. Plenty of seating options from high tops to a private meeting area equipped with floor to ceiling industrial style pocket doors. There is also faux leather and patio seating perfect for close-quarter intimate conversations over a nice hot cup of Joe.   I want all locations to mimic this one. I seriously  haven't been as excited as I was when I experienced their virtual drive-thru ordering system since I don't know when! This SBUX is a breath of fresh air for Ferguson and I'm ecstatic to see it here.  ~Christy

This is a pretty solid Starbucks w a great staff.  They have never gotten my drink order wrong.  The restaurant for the most part is always clean.  My one huge complaint about this Starbucks is the entrance to the drive up.  It tends to become a cluster Bc it has 2 ways in which clogs the exit and people will not let you pass to exit nor will they let you alternate to get into the line.  Starbucks people are very possessive about their place in the line.

I have to give this starbucks a little love. It is my "go to" since it is around the corner from where I work. I have been to other Starbucks in the area and I feel like this one is my favorite!  I like the Carothers Pkwy Starbucks because I can almost always find a parking spot and grab my drink in time to get to work. I would agree that probably 50-75% of the time that I stop in in the morning there is a long line, but I don't really have a comment on that other than...... get the Starbucks app..... It's the easiest way to order your stuff, especially if it's complicated and you get stars, free drinks, etc.  I have sat in a long line in the drive-thru here, but unless you have kids or some other reason why you can't quickly get out of the car....   1. Park  2. Order your stuff on the Starbucks App..... 3. Get out of the car and pick it up off the counter 3 minutes later 4. Get back in car while you laugh because you still see the person in the drive-thru sitting in the same place they were 10 minutes ago.

This is a great Starbucks location.  It is located right across the street from MacEwan University and is a great study spot for students as their is free wifi and plenty of seating.  Staff and friendly and drinks always made perfectly.

I've become a regular at this Starbucks as I am from early afternoon all the way to close, to be in a calm, casual yet lively environment while I study for school. As I observe the operations at this Starbucks I notice the kids here (mostly high school/college age but some older folk too) are doing a very fine job at keeping up with the high demand. They are consistently patient and polite with even the most confused/impatient customers. I notice they clean the bathrooms seemingly every couple hours which, in some food businesses, consider yourself blessed if they do it once a day. The shop had wifi issues once which I brought to a young man's attention (manager? Not sure) and he graciously came over and put on his IT hat while it was decently busy and tended to my needs. He called the provider and requested their assistance promptly. It was nice to know they cared.   All in all, good set of employees and shouldn't be penalized for having a giant drive thru line... you're in warm car, can't bother to park, and complaining about the drive thru lol. If the wait bothers you that much, try ordering ahead of time. They can only make drinks so fast.
Great service, quick and ready when we got to the window utilizing the Mobil ordering app.  Zendaya got her pup cup and was beyond happy!

Clean and semi-empty on July 4 during their limited opening hours. Got the $3 frap promo of Double Fudge Bar for me and Caramel Waffle Cone for the friend. The Caramel waffle Cone was too sweet for my liking and same with the Double Fudge Bar. Such have stuck with my usual Green Tea Frap, but this is the point of these $3-Frap promo=for you to try something out of your comfort zone.  Anyway, the milks were empty and I placed them at the Starbucks counter and notified the staff to replaced them. After 30 minutes, they did no such thing. At least they have nice tables where you can do your laptop work, but no plugs near the tables.

Yay for drive thru.  Yay for patio.  Yay for change tables in both men's and women's washrooms!   Yay for lots of natural light and seating.   Boo for waiting a looooooong time for my drink.  Yay for friendly barista.  Boo for pretty small merch options in a location this big.  Yay for coffee!

Service here is at the level of a 7-11.  Boy taking order gave off attitude that he was too good to make eye contact.  Condiments area had only one cooler which was unlabeled.  Could not get anyone's attention until I had to raise my voice to find out what was in the container, and get some milk.  I left feedback with Starbucks and will give one more try, but based on other reviews here I doubt it.
Max did a great job redoing my drink after coming from another Starbucks where I was unhappy with what I got. Thank you Max!!!
Typical Starbucks quality food OK prices but this particular time service was super slow. We even had to remind them in the drive-through of the cake. Forgive them though
Drinks are good. Device is fast and friendly. Place is always clean.
Nice coffee and selection of breakfast items. The inside is busy on a Saturday morning. Come before 8am if you can't wait.

Love my Large Sugar Free Cinnamon Dolce, Soy latte .... These are great. Every few though you will find one that is more bitter not sure why, but sometimes it's not perfect. I like the drive thru ability... So I come back.
my once-a-month place while waiting for my wife's meeting to end. Always busy, a bit noisy but if I xan sit in the comfy chair. Im happy. Friendly baristas.

So I know there are a lot of "neighbors refuse corporate brews" campaigns around and, in a coffee city, why choose Starbucks? First of all, I like the consistency in flavor and price. I can't do CC's coffee-flavored water and PJ's is over a dollar more for the type of drink I order. BUT, all of that aside, I will go out of my way to go to this Starbucks location because it is a wonderful oasis where everyone is friendly and efficient and things are clean and orderly and there is lot of safe parking. The baristas (baristos? they've always been all men in my experience) *kind of* give off that douchey "I'm super knowledgable about coffee" vibe, but they seem to care a lot about customer service and that is an A+ in my book.

This location has a very friendly & helpful staff so I think we've decided to make it one of our stops when we're in the area! It's also a clean shop and of course Starbucks coffee is just great so it makes our decision to visit that much easier  - there are so many great coffee brews & special drinks to choose from! The only thing I haven't tried here is the restroom (lol),  it if it's like the rest of the shop it's just fine!
Just moved to Roxborough, and I walked there after going to the bank. Very friendly staff, they complimented my accent and gave me great service. I shall return. :)

Perfect location Starbucks in New Orleans Business District, while still close enough to the hotels in the area. Catering to both business and tourist crowd. The barista are efficient, polite and fast. Also the location is large enough for lounging if you want to hang out indoor in AC.

The best Starbucks around!!! Kind, engaging, fast, detailed, and they remember their regulars!   I travel the Western stats and by far this is the best location ever! They never get an order wrong and the staff are always happy to help!
They really know how to make a dry cap, dry. Clean, fast-ish, and friendly. Super clean thrones also.

This is one of the local Starbucks that is definitely hit and miss. Sometimes the oder is perfect, sometimes screwy. Sometimes you order mobile and the order is ready when you get there and sometimes they haven't even realized it is there. And then there is the time when a woman has her child and her dirty bare feet standing on the counter at checkout and the star doesn't open their f'ing mouth to ask the woman to move the child. It seems as it the woman works there. If they'd like, I can come put py bare feet on the counter and see what they say. Better yet, have them bring me home and I can put my feet on their kitchen table. Unsanitary! For sure!!
Awesome location with amazing people working. Always do their best and strive to make you happy and enjoy your visit. AAA+++

This is probably the worst Starbucks I have ever been to. Went in for a simple double chocolate chip and what I got was milk mixed with water in a cup with whip cream on top. Would never recommend to anyone. Severely disappointed.

I frequent Starbucks often. I have Crohns Disease and their Chocolate Banana protein Smoothie makes a great breakfast replacement meal without upsetting my stomach, however this Starbucks location can never get it right. The few times Ive asked them to make it, it always comes out very bland... Equivalent to the taste of milk, bananas and ice. It's very disappointing and seems to be the only location that serves it this way.  This morning my husband wanted iced coffee and this particular Starbucks happened to be closest to where we were. He ordered a Mocha Frappuccino with a shot of espresso. He too was very disappointed with the flavor. He said it tasted  as if they were skimping on using all the ingredients, much like my smoothie. If I'm going to pay the same price regardless, I'd much rather go to a different Starbucks location with better quality.

I try avoiding this Starbucks location, I'll even go out of my way to go to the other westshore location I I have enough time. Unfortunately tonight I did not have that luxury.  The employees here are clueless EVERY.SINGLE.TIME. Why??? I don't get it. Besides never knowing what they are doing or what is going on, they are incredibly slow. There are 2 other Starbucks locations off of westshore, I highly recommend going to one of those if you want to enjoy a coffee while you shop!

Coming from someone whos worked at starbucks before i was disappointed with the person who took my order. The Barista was great it was the person who rung me up for the wrong drink and wrote it down incorrectly. (He also made a mistake on the persons drink before me). I asked for a Tripe grande soy carmel mach. not an espresso mach. Obviously the guy wasnt listening to me so now im stuck with a drink i didnt order.
Very good coffee. Great for any morning fix. Moderately crowded, but has good cappuchinos. I love the smoothies. Tip: bring food from starbucks to he movie theater for a movie snack.

I've been to a ton of Starbucks in Philadelphia, in New Jersey, in Delaware. But this 18th and Chestnut Starbucks was amazingly impressive. The Baristas were friendly, but not overly fake.  They were prompt with my order, and asked me out of courtesy if I wanted it a bit hotter since it was cold out.  I loved the upstairs seating which has an awesome view of Chestnut Street.   You may think that all Starbucks are the same, but this is totally not the case whatsoever.  Also worth mentioning is that the bathroom was very clean.

This is an awesome Starbucks. There are lots of windows. It is bright and open and the baristas are always friendly and professional. They get to know you and your preferences.  The only thing that is less than ideal is that there is slightly limited seating when things get busy. However we find the atmosphere to be much more professional then the second cup not far from there.   Overall great place.

Came into today with my boyfriend and ordered an iced cinnamon almond milk macchiato, caramel nonfat frappuccino & a venti blonde roast with a shot of espresso. They messed up all 3 drinks and our sandwiches came out burnt after waiting for 20 minutes after ordering.

I typically wouldn't spend the time writing a review of a Starbucks, to me they're all pretty much the same, however I want to give a big shoutout to the 1500 Market team for always getting my day off to a good start.   This location is a zoo, I mean suits and ties, pumps and pencil skirts packed to the gills all day every day. The line can be 15 deep and yet I have never waited from the end of the line to drink-in-hand more than 5 minutes. Now mind you I'm not exactly the "Venti 1 pump caramel, 1 pump white mocha, 2 scoops vanilla bean powder, extra ice frappuchino with 2 shots poured over the top (apagotto style) with caramel drizzle under and on top of the whipped cream, double cupped" kind, a simple iced coffee will do, however this place runs like a well oiled machine.  Line getting a little long? Don't sweat it, there's always a friendly faced employee taking advanced orders for drinks to expedite your wait time. By the time you get to the register to pay for your concoction, you're never waiting more than another minute or two for the barista to shout out your name.   Thanks 15th and Market S-Bucks for making my mornings a little brighter and still managing to get me to work in time.

My friends and I went through the Starbucks drive thru this morning. It would be a complete understatement to say this was the most well oiled caffeine-fueled delicious machine. 7 women. 7 different drinks. 7 items of food. Not a single mistake. Anyone traveling through Indianapolis should stop at this beacon of eternal sunlight. 10 million stars.

This is probably my favorite Starbucks. It's really chill in here and the location is good! The other Starbucks I've been to are just so busy and everyone wants to talk to you lol  I love talking but not when I have work to do. Try this one out! :)

It's Starbucks, chain coffee house. Similar to fast food places, if you're going here you should know what to expect.   This location specifically the drive through always seems to be slow. The parking lot can be very crowded and awkward. It has a Japanese steakhouse next to it. (Which on a side note is fantastic)  The review is 3 stars cause this place is just average. Some of the employees are  great and others not so much. The drinks are sometimes great and others not so much. Overall I've been to worse locations and been to better. But this is my go to/closest location so it's bound for me to experience the ups and downs.
Favorite Starbucks in the area mainly because of the drive thru. They are always consistent and friendly so I have no complaints.
Coffee is good but scone has too much sugar, preservative or something that makes the flour too much like a pastry. Starbucks please do not call it a scone this one even has frosting. Blech!

This is the first Starbucks I've been to where there isn't a 20 minute long line and I love it! I usually go to Starbucks for a calm environment and most of the time they're overcrowded and loud from all the people. The staff is really friendly and quick with the service.
This is my favorite starbucks. The staff is always friendly with me. They're knowledgable and the drinks are consistent. I work nearby and frequent this location. I've never had a bad experience.

Slowest Starbucks drive thru in history. I could have driven back home, brewed a pot of coffee, and packed a travel mug in the time it takes to get through their drive thru. Parking your car and heading inside is not any better either. It's unfortunate, but it's the only Starbucks with a drive thru in the Riverview area.

Definitely by far the best Starbucks in the Bucks area - that I have been to. It is new and clean , and has maintained its cleanliness. I have seen it very busy to the point you cannot get a seat and it is still clean, unlike other locations who drop the ball. I also have noticed that there is never a significant wait time for drinks, which is always a plus. This location always is well staffed, maybe because of the drive thru? The staff is always super nice here and friendly and will converse with whomever, not just their favorite customers. I definitely feel like they do a great job with customer service. Between that, their expertly crafted drinks, and an overall great environment, this is always my Starbucks of choice. On the weekends it does close earlier than other Starbucks so sometimes it is not always an option, but when it is, I will always pick this location! A+

This Starbucks took 25 minutes and 4 tries to give me and my wife a grande iced caramel macchiato and venti skim chai. The drive thru line is a closed line so we were held hostage and could not drive away. They kept handing us drinks that were the wrong size, which is annoying but forgiveable, or the complete wrong drink (like, why did you hand me a tall latte and try to tell me it was a grande caramel macchiato?!).   Stay away!

I have been to this Starbucks many times - right across the stress from CVS - and close to my former job.  No issues - very busy during morning rush (as is expected).  Good service and consistent beverage quality.  $5 coffees.  Whoo-hoo!

Standard Starbuck - mid-size location (Not huge and not tiny). Decent service - youngish staff of disinterested baristas just "doing their job".  Efficient but not warm nor friendly.  Drinks were fine - I got my kid a decaf frappucino so she was in 11 year old heaven. Ice tea was fine.  No big whoop. Glad it's here to get our four-bucks fix.

This place is crowded like most Starbucks and the coffee is too bitter for my taste.  My main problem here (and all Starbucks in general) is the generally slow service.  The staff are mostly good people but there seems to be a lot of chaos.  It seems like most of the work falls on the barista and the rest of the staff doesn't know what everyone else is doing.  Go to Saxby's instead.
I love the drive thru, very easy if you are on the road already or are in a hurry. Staff is always so friendly and I've never had a problem with the taste or quality of my drinks/food.

This is my second time coming here ,and  the barista ( Ash or Ashley - I really don't remember the name ) already remembered exactly how I want my drink to be .The staffs here are very friendly , and they always greeting you in with a big smile no matter how busy they are .
Last time, a month ago, was terrible. Today I am here for lunch and I'm impressed by freshly brewed coffee&cream, bagels and cookies by the cashier, all fresh and service was fast!
Awesome customer service! Just passing through land needed a coffee fix! Beautiful scenic drive off the beaten path of Interstate 40.

Shoutout to the barista with the awesome dinosaur shirt. Just as a mark of authenticity, my three drink order came out to $10 even. I didn't get your name, but you were great! To the rest of the staff- thanks!

I recently popped in here before my nail appointment to grab a quick pick me up. There was only one person ahead of me and it looked as though she was purchasing a gift card.   The two baristas that were working were trying to figure out how to ring in her purchase but we're having a difficult time.   The customer suggested taking my order and allowing me to go first while they figured out the gift card. The baristas said it was only going to be a second so I replied that I wasn't in a huge rush.   10 mins later... (Yes, I was watching the clock) The TWO people working still hadn't figured it out! I sadly had to walk out... I really should have said something but I was furious!   I don't think I will be back to this location. The lack of service, teamwork and disregard for the customers was a real turn off!

yeah dude. it's starbucks... i don't even remember which one this is. oh yeah, old city. let's see. this one is GREAT if you have to piss during first friday. no line, and you don't even have to buy anything...

A little small inside. If you're coming to get some studying done or work, it's not very comfortable. The staff is very kind though and the drinks are fantastic. I lost my gloves a week ago and it turned out that only one was missing.
